contentDescriptions.description: Explore and apply visual arts techniques, technologies and processes to develop their own visual language.
Investigate how artists use visual conventions and visual arts elements to communicate ideas, beliefs and cultural perspectives.
Develop and refine performance and composition skills using the music elements of duration, pitch, dynamics, tone colour, texture and structure.
Apply drama techniques and processes, including character, voice, movement and space, to make and present drama.
Develop skills in using and evaluating visual arts techniques and technologies to refine their visual language and artistic expression.
Develop sustained artistic practice, refining technical skills and visual language to communicate complex ideas and perspectives.
Analyse and interpret artworks within their social, cultural and historical contexts.
Apply sophisticated visual arts techniques and refine personal artistic style to communicate a sustained artistic vision.
